creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text: Thank you. I'm sorry I didn't follow your advice. It was me who was to make this patch. You already showed me it wasn't that difficult, I just didn't believe that I could do it right. I may test it now, though the world of Ocaml is still seemed as terra incognita to me, so I'm likely to less do things myself and more rely on the help of people with real experience in this area.
